steps.title: Your Navigation Menu
steps.body: Everything you need to manage your website is in this left-hand menu. We've simplified it to show only what's relevant to you.

steps.title: Blog Posts
steps.body: Click here to write new blog posts, edit existing ones, or manage your categories and tags.

steps.title: Media Library
steps.body: All the images, PDFs, and files you've uploaded to your site live here. You can search, organise, and upload new files any time.

steps.title: Pages
steps.body: Your website's main pages — About, Contact, Services, and so on — are managed here. You can edit their content but avoid changing their titles, as that can affect your URLs.

steps.title: Your Account
steps.body: Click your name here to update your profile, change your password, or log out. Keep your password safe and don't share your login with anyone.
